flagDescriptions.DUPE_DISTRACTOR: a selected distractor equals the correct answer
flagDescriptions.SELF_ANSWERING: correct answer appears verbatim in question stem (excluding {___})
flagDescriptions.LENGTH_TELL: correct answer length deviates >3× from mean distractor length
flagDescriptions.SHORT_EXPLANATION: fact.explanation is missing or shorter than 20 chars
flagDescriptions.ORPHAN_POOL_MEMBER: pool exists but fact.id not in pool.factIds
flagDescriptions.CORRECT_IN_DISTRACTORS_SOURCE: fact.distractors source array contains the correct answer
